creator: smh@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 166147
Patch to update port to rrdtool 1.5.5

Our ports version of rrdtool is still 1.4.8 while the latest in that series is 1.4.9 and the latest stable version is 1.5.5.

I've tested converting to 1.5.5 and the attached patch and all built fine.

It may be worth creating rrdtool14 port for those that wont to stay on 1.4.
